title: gladiolus brachyphyllus
intro: Gladiolus brachyphyllus, also known as the dwarf corn lily or narrow-leaved gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as acting as an expectorant to ease respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus brachyphyllus include infusions and decoctions made from its roots and leaves, which are used to treat a range of ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
